name: factory-engine-monorepo
description: Factory — local-first AI coding automation. Engine (libSQL + WebSocket live wire) + brutalist UI (local Vite + hosted Next), no cloud DB required.

scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:engine
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix engine run typecheck && npm --prefix ui run typecheck && npm --prefix web run typecheck
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix engine install && npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix web install
